scripts.title: Moderna Leads Today's Movers
scripts.hook: Moderna jumped a strong 10 percent today.

beats.vo: That rally followed positive comments from Jim Cramer, who said he liked having a position in Moderna for the first time in ages.
beats.caption: Cramer likes MRNA

beats.vo: Cramer highlighted the stock's significant gains this year and advised investors on navigating today's market rotation.
beats.caption: MRNA's yearly gains

beats.vo: Moderna's move comes as the broader market trades sideways and oil dips, with Q2 earnings season just around the corner.
beats.caption: Q2 earnings ahead

scripts.disclaimer: For information only — not financial advice.
scripts.fbCaption: Moderna made a big move today! Here's why. For information only — not financial advice.

scripts.title: Apple Climbs, Tesla Drops Today
scripts.hook: Apple shares climbed almost 5 percent today.

beats.vo: The iPhone maker saw gains after news of its plans for foldable iPhones and an iPhone Ultra push in late 2026 and early 2027.
beats.caption: Apple's foldable iPhone plans

beats.vo: Meanwhile, Netflix was also up over 4 and a half percent, as the company reported delivering an asset-light cash haul in its latest quarter.
beats.caption: Netflix cash flow strong

beats.vo: On the downside, Tesla lost nearly 7 and a half percent, with cautious outlooks from analysts amid ongoing developments in its robotaxi and Optimus programs.
beats.caption: Tesla robotaxi outlook

beats.vo: Dell dropped over 7 percent, moving with the broader semiconductor sector today.
beats.caption: Dell moves with sector

scripts.disclaimer: For information only — not financial advice.
scripts.fbCaption: Apple, Netflix, Tesla, and Dell all saw significant moves today. Get the rundown! For information only — not financial advice.

scripts.title: Oil Prices Dip Amid Geopolitical Shifts
scripts.hook: Geopolitical tensions and oil prices saw movement today.

beats.vo: Oil dipped to pre-Iran war prices, influencing broader market sentiment ahead of Q2 earnings.
beats.caption: Oil prices dip

beats.vo: This comes as Reuters reported Iran is exploring oil sales to Japan, with buyers seeking longer sanctions waivers.
beats.caption: Iran eyes Japan oil sales

beats.vo: Additionally, the funeral of Khamenei in Iran projected a hardline grip, while Turkey's Erdogan commented on potential US-Iran deals.
beats.caption: Geopolitical shifts

scripts.disclaimer: For information only — not financial advice.
scripts.fbCaption: Oil prices and geopolitical headlines made waves today. Here's what you need to know. For information only — not financial advice.
